scenes.title: Mrs. Crumb's Bakery
scenes.description: The smell of honey and cinnamon fills the air... but the Sun-Cakes are gone! Mrs. Crumb (a stout halfling with flour on her nose) is distraught.
scenes.introNarration: A scream rings out from the bakery! Mrs. Crumb is waving a rolling pin... 'Oh no! My Sun-Cakes are gone! There's blue frosting everywhere!'

dmNotes.tip: Let kids search behind counter and under tables

scenes.title: Oakhaven Market Square
scenes.description: The cobblestone square bustles with vendors selling enchanted trinkets, roasted chestnuts, and colorful festival banners. A frantic merchant waves you over — his delivery cart has been raided too!
scenes.introNarration: The cobblestone square bustles with vendors and festival banners. A frantic merchant waves you over — his delivery cart has been raided!

dmNotes.tip: Encourage bartering and trading with vendors

scenes.title: The Sparkle Woods
scenes.description: The trees glow like emeralds and the wind whispers secrets. Hoot the Riddle-Owl (wearing tiny spectacles) blocks your path.
scenes.introNarration: The trees glow like emeralds. A large owl wearing tiny spectacles blocks the path and hoots: 'Answer my riddle, or no passage!'

dmNotes.tactics: Hoot: Wing Buffet if annoyed. Silverfang: Bite first, then Howl
dmNotes.tip: Make Hoot silly and theatrical — kids love funny voices

scenes.title: The Fairy Glade
scenes.description: Sunbeams pierce the canopy like golden pillars. Tiny glowing lights dance between wildflowers — these are the Glade Fairies, and their firefly lanterns have escaped!
scenes.introNarration: Sunbeams pierce the canopy like golden pillars. Tiny glowing lights dance between wildflowers — the firefly lanterns have escaped!

dmNotes.tactics: Pixie Dust is harmless annoyance, Giggle Zap tickles
dmNotes.tip: Describe the fairies as tiny and giggly, not threatening

scenes.title: The Glimmer Stream
scenes.description: A wide stream of liquid silver cuts through the forest. Smooth stones poke above the surface, glittering with embedded crystals. One wrong step means a splash!
scenes.introNarration: A wide stream of liquid silver blocks your path. Smooth stones glitter above the surface. One wrong step means a splash!

dmNotes.tip: Let creative solutions work (throwing rope, using logs)

scenes.title: Goblin Hollow
scenes.description: Ramshackle tents and crooked lanterns fill a forest clearing. The goblins aren't evil — they're just hungry and scared. Their leader, Grumbletooth, sits on a barrel throne eating a stolen Sun-Cake.
scenes.introNarration: Ramshackle tents fill the clearing. These goblins aren't evil — just hungry and scared. Their leader sits on a barrel throne eating a stolen Sun-Cake.

dmNotes.tactics: Grumbletooth: Rusty Sword + Thrown Rock. Snick: sneaky flanker
dmNotes.tip: Reward diplomacy! Goblins can become allies if treated kindly

scenes.title: The Crystal Caverns
scenes.description: Thousands of crystals line the cave walls, each humming a faint musical note. Touching them in the right order reveals hidden passages. Crystal bats flutter between stalactites overhead.
scenes.introNarration: Thousands of crystals hum faint musical notes. Crystal bats flutter between stalactites overhead. Touch the crystals in the right order...

dmNotes.tactics: Sonic Squeak first (area), then Wing Slash on closest
dmNotes.tip: Describe crystals humming different notes as players touch them

scenes.title: The Skythread Bridge
scenes.description: An ancient rope bridge stretches across a misty chasm. The planks creak and sway with every step. Strange wisps of shadow dance beneath it, whispering forgotten names.
scenes.introNarration: An ancient rope bridge stretches across a misty chasm. The planks creak and sway. Strange wisps of shadow dance beneath it...

dmNotes.tactics: Cold Touch from range, Vanish Strike if flanked
dmNotes.tip: Build tension with swaying bridge + whispering shadows

scenes.title: Moonlit Campfire
scenes.description: A sheltered clearing beneath ancient pines. The fire crackles warmly as stars fill the sky above. This is a safe place to rest, tell stories, and gaze at the constellations.
scenes.introNarration: The fire crackles warmly as stars fill the sky. This is a safe place to rest, tell stories, and gaze at the constellations above.

dmNotes.tip: Ask each player to share their hero's backstory

scenes.title: The Forgotten Shrine
scenes.description: Moss-covered stone pillars form a circle around a cracked altar. Ancient runes glow faintly beneath the ivy. A massive Stone Guardian stands motionless — until someone approaches the altar.
scenes.introNarration: Moss-covered stone pillars form a circle around a cracked altar. Ancient runes glow faintly. A massive Stone Guardian stands motionless... waiting.

dmNotes.tactics: Stone Fist on melee targets, Ground Slam if surrounded
dmNotes.tip: Guardian can be pacified by solving the Rune puzzle first

scenes.title: Whispering Peak
scenes.description: The wind sounds like soft singing. Inside a cozy cave, you find Glint the Dragon licking frosting off his claws. He looks up with big golden eyes — scared, not scary.
scenes.introNarration: The wind sounds like soft singing. Inside a cozy cave, Glint the Dragon licks frosting off his claws. He looks up with big golden eyes — scared, not scary.

dmNotes.tactics: Frosting Breath (area), Tail Swipe on closest. Glint is scared!
dmNotes.tip: Glint can be befriended — he just wants to bake cakes!

scenes.title: Festival of Heroes
scenes.description: Oakhaven glows with lanterns and streamers! Mrs. Crumb has baked a dragon-shaped cake. The whole village cheers as the heroes return. Glint sits happily beside the bakery, wearing a tiny chef hat.
scenes.introNarration: Oakhaven glows with lanterns and streamers! Mrs. Crumb has baked a dragon-shaped cake! The whole village cheers as the heroes return!

dmNotes.npcs: All NPCs return for the party
dmNotes.tip: Let each player describe their hero's victory pose
